title: Kuwait Petroleum Corp reports damage at units after Iran drone attacks | Reuters
description: April 5 (Reuters) - Iranian drone attacks hit various targets in Kuwait on Sunday, ​with state energy company Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reporting ‌fires and "severe material damage" at some operating units.
